sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 48:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 48:1
items.html: When the screen is refined and there is no coupling in Keter, the name Yod-Hey is simple, without filling. When there is a coupling in Keter, the name Yod-Hey is in filling. (Item 56)
